Headline: Closure - Moray Council State Schools, Moray
Info: Primary and secondary schools across Moray will close to all pupils on Thursday, 19 March 2026, due to planned strike action by a teachers' union over workload concerns. Another potential closure on Wednesday, 25 March 2026, is also being considered.

Headline: Closure - Dundee City Council State Schools, Dundee
Info: Dundee schools could face closure for two days, 18 and 24 March 2026, if teachers proceed with strike action over workload concerns. Dundee City Council is currently assessing the safety implications for nurseries and schools.
